title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Vedantu - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Vedantu - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Curriculum Developer looking for your next big career move? Vedantu in Nagpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Vedantu:
Vedantu is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vedantu!
